member.name: T:Skafinity.MusicGen
member.summary:
Deterministic procedural ska / reggae-rock track generator (issue: procedural music).
A player's 8-hex player_tag seeds a portable PRNG (xmur3 → mulberry32); the PRNG drives every musical choice (tempo, key, progression, bass / skank / organ / lead / drum patterns) so the SAME tag always produces the SAME song. Output is interleaved stereo 16-bit PCM (for SoundStream) or a WAV (debug).
PORTABILITY (web parity): the *composition* is whatever the PRNG emits — a web client reproduces the same arrangement by mirroring xmur3 + mulberry32 and this file's note-selection order, using the same values. Synthesis (oscillators/filters below) only needs matching for bit-identical audio.
Synthesis: subtractive — unison-detuned oscillators through a resonant low-pass state-variable filter with a cutoff envelope (warm, not "8-bit"); full synth drum kit (kick/snare/toms/hats/crash + fills). Default voicing aims for a Sublime vibe: laid-back reggae-rock tempo, bass-forward, prominent clean skank + organ bubble.

member.name: M:Skafinity.MusicGen.FinishStereo
member.summary: Master-normalize and interleave to stereo 16-bit PCM. Call after every window has finished.

member.name: M:Skafinity.MusicGen.RenderPitchedRange(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Synthesize every pitched event whose span overlaps [from, to), writing ONLY samples inside that window. Safe to call concurrently for disjoint windows: each output index is owned by exactly one window, a boundary-spanning note is re-rendered from its own start by each window (the SVF / high-pass state can't be resumed mid-stream), and each window walks _events in order, so writes never collide and the per-index sum order is deterministic.

member.name: M:Skafinity.MusicGen.WavFromSamples(System.Int16[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Wrap already-rendered 16-bit samples in a WAV (for export). Mono or interleaved stereo per .

member.name: T:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer
member.summary:
Streams an endless, deterministic procedural ska / reggae-rock track (see ) through Web Audio-style scheduling over a .
Drop this on any GameObject. It generates a ~80s loop from the seed tag:n, plays it times, then equal-power crossfades into the pre-generated next song (tag:n+1), forever. Every generator knob is an inspector [Property]; with on, tweaking one regenerates after a short settle so you can dial in a vibe in play mode.
A whole song is just its seed, so the arrangement is shareable: copy (vibe:tag:n) and anyone who calls with it hears the same track.
This is a self-contained extraction of the Rotaliate music engine with no game-specific dependencies (no player data, networking, or UI). Persistence of the song index is opt-in via .

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.Enabled
member.summary: Music master switch. 'new' so it's distinct from .

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.LiveReload
member.summary: Regenerate automatically a moment after any generator knob changes (editor tuning).

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.MixerName
member.summary: Optional mixer name to route the music to (e.g. "Music"). Empty = default mixer.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.AutoPlay
member.summary: Begin playing automatically in . Off = call yourself.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.RandomEverySong
member.summary: Shuffle mode: re-randomise every knob (incl. genre + volumes) as each new song begins, so the sequence keeps reinventing itself. Off = the seed's vibe stays put.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.Tag
member.summary: Seed tag — any string (a name, a word). Empty falls back to "skafinity".

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.StartN
member.summary: Song index in the infinite sequence (0,1,2…). / walk it.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.Vibe
member.summary: Optional base-36 vibe override (see ). When set it overrides the matching inspector knobs, so a shared vibe reproduces the same voicing on any client.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.PersistProgress
member.summary: Persist the current song index across sessions (FileSystem.Data, keyed by ).

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.TargetSeconds
member.summary: Target track length; bar count adapts to tempo to hit this.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.RenderThreads
member.summary: Worker threads the pitched-voice synthesis is split across (composition + drums stay single-threaded). Keeps each worker burst under s&box's ~1000ms no-yield advisory.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.Crossfade
member.summary: Crossfade window (also the first song's fade-in from silence), seconds. The two songs only both-audible for of this, centred.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.LoopsPerSong
member.summary: How many times each loop plays before crossfading on (2 = play through, loop once, switch).

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.AheadCount
member.summary: How many upcoming songs to keep pre-generated (built one-per-tick so the fill never stalls a frame).

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.ForceInstrument
member.summary: -1 = RNG; 0=Trumpet 1=Sax 2=Organ 3=Trombone.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.N
member.summary: Currently-playing song index.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.CurrentVibe
member.summary: The effective vibe — the override if set, else the encoded inspector knobs.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.CurrentSeed
member.summary: Shareable seed for the playing song: vibe:tag:n.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.IsPlaying
member.summary: True once a stream handle is live and audible.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.ConfigureFlat
member.summary: Make the stream play as flat 2D (SpacialBlend=0, parented to the camera with FollowParent so the listener can't pan/attenuate it). Optionally routes to a named mixer.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.EffectiveConfig
member.summary: The config currently in effect (inspector knobs with any applied).

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.FillAhead(System.Int32)
member.summary: Top the look-ahead buffer up to , generating each song on a worker thread. Fire-and-forget from OnUpdate; guards against a sequence restart landing a stale song in the buffer.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.WriteSongBody(System.Int16[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Write passes of interleaved-stereo to the stream, given the first frames of pass 0 were already emitted, holding back the final frames for the next crossfade. Optional fade-in over the first frames of pass 0. Returns frames written.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.StartSequence
member.summary: (Re)start the infinite sequence at the current tag/n. Bumps the sequence token (invalidating any in-flight generation), stops the current handle, then kicks the async (worker-thread) start so the caller never blocks.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.PlaySeed(System.String)
member.summary: Play a shareable seed in any of the forms vibe:tag:n, tag:n, or tag. Missing components are left unchanged; a vibe is only applied when present. Restarts the sequence.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.SetTag(System.String)
member.summary: Set just the seed tag (empty = the default "skafinity" seed). Restarts.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.SetN(System.Int32)
member.summary: Jump to song index n in the sequence (clamped ≥ 0). Restarts.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.StepN(System.Int32)
member.summary: Step the song index by (e.g. +1 / -1). Restarts.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.NextSong
member.summary: Skip to the next song in the sequence.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.PrevSong
member.summary: Step back to the previous song in the sequence.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.SetVibe(System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Set vibe field (see ) from a 0..1 fraction, store the re-encoded , and restart on a short debounce.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.SetGenre(System.Int32)
member.summary: Switch genre (rides in the vibe's first char): re-encode the effective config with the new genre into so it sticks over the inspector knobs, then restart. Use this rather than setting directly — an existing override otherwise wins and the change wouldn't take.

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.RerollVibe(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Randomize the vibe knobs and restart on a short debounce. By default the per-instrument volumes (and genre) are left alone so a reroll re-voices without upending the mix; pass / for a full shuffle. Pass = false to re-voice without yanking the playhead — the caller is then responsible for letting the change take effect (e.g. by clearing the look-ahead so upcoming songs regenerate with the new vibe).

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityPlayer.SaveCurrentToFile
member.summary: Write the playing song's raw loop (no fade) to a WAV under FileSystem.Data. Returns the filename written, or null on failure.

member.name: T:Skafinity.VibeCodec
member.summary:
Compact, shareable encoding of the "important" knobs — the ones that define a song's vibe (genre, tempo, per-instrument mix/tone/character). Each knob is quantised to one base-36 character (16 discrete levels, i.e. a hex digit) and the genre rides in the first character, so the whole vibe is a short string that travels in the seed as vibe:tag:n.
WIRE FORMAT (genre-independent envelope, fixed positions): [genre char][global block][instrument grid] where the global block is in order, and the instrument grid reserves up to blocks of 4 columns (volume / tone / character / extra). Column c of instrument i always lives at position 1 + globals + i*4 + c, so adding a genre, an instrument, or a 5th column never shifts an existing position. APPEND-ONLY now means: append global knobs, append instrument slots (≤ MaxInstruments), and only ever append columns past the 4th. ignores trailing chars a shorter string lacks, so a vibe from a client with fewer slots still parses (the missing knobs keep their config defaults).
Lossy by design (16 levels/knob) but stable: Encode(Decode(s)) == s.

member.name: F:Skafinity.VibeCodec.Field.Choices
member.summary: Discrete option labels (value = Min + index); null for a continuous knob.

member.name: F:Skafinity.VibeCodec.Field.Voice
member.summary: Instrument row this knob belongs to (null = a GLOBAL knob).

member.name: F:Skafinity.VibeCodec.Field.Column
member.summary: Matrix column: 0 volume, 1 tone, 2 character, 3 extra (ignored for globals).

member.name: F:Skafinity.VibeCodec.Field.InSeed
member.summary: Whether this knob travels in the shareable vibe seed. Per-instrument VOLUME knobs set this false: volume is a local mix preference persisted per-voice (see ), not part of the song's identity. The grid slot is still reserved on the wire (filler char) so the other columns keep their fixed positions.

member.name: M:Skafinity.VibeCodec.Field.GetNorm(Skafinity.MusicGen.Config)
member.summary: Current value as a 0..1 fraction of the range.

member.name: M:Skafinity.VibeCodec.Field.SetNorm(Skafinity.MusicGen.Config,System.Single)
member.summary: Set from a 0..1 fraction (rounded for integer/discrete knobs).

member.name: M:Skafinity.VibeCodec.Field.Display(Skafinity.MusicGen.Config)
member.summary: Human-readable current value for the row header.

member.name: M:Skafinity.VibeCodec.Fields(System.Int32)
member.summary: Flat list (globals then the genre's instrument grid, row-major, skipping empty cells) — the source the music panel iterates to build its controls. Each field carries its / so the UI can lay out the matrix without a second table.

member.name: M:Skafinity.VibeCodec.IsVolume(Skafinity.VibeCodec.Field)
member.summary: True if is a per-instrument VOLUME knob — column 0 of an instrument row, kept out of the shareable seed and persisted per-voice instead.

member.name: M:Skafinity.VibeCodec.ReadVolumes(System.Int32,Skafinity.MusicGen.Config)
member.summary: Read the per-instrument volumes of off as a voice → 0..1 level map. The key is the instrument's voice NAME (not its genre/position), so a voice that appears in several genres (e.g. BASS, DRUMS) shares one persisted level. Merge this into a single store across genres.

member.name: M:Skafinity.VibeCodec.ApplyVolumes(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Single},Skafinity.MusicGen.Config)
member.summary: Overlay a voice → 0..1 level map (from / storage) onto for . Voices absent from the map keep their current/default level. Call this after so a song's saved mix rides on top of the seed's voicing.

member.name: M:Skafinity.VibeCodec.Encode(Skafinity.MusicGen.Config)
member.summary: Encode the vibe-defining knobs of (including its genre) to a base-36 string.

member.name: M:Skafinity.VibeCodec.Apply(System.String,Skafinity.MusicGen.Config)
member.summary: Apply a vibe string onto in place. Reads the genre from the first char, then walks the fixed wire positions. Silently ignores empty/malformed input and any trailing positions the string is too short to cover.

member.name: P:Skafinity.VibeCodec.MaxLength
member.summary: Largest possible well-formed vibe length: genre + globals + the full reserved instrument grid.

member.name: M:Skafinity.VibeCodec.LooksLikeVibe(System.String)
member.summary: True if looks like a vibe token: all base-36 and within the vibe length band. The floor stays well above an 8-char player tag (and the 9-char default "rotaliate") so the two never collide in vibe:tag:n.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityMusicPanel.Player
member.summary: The player this panel drives. Leave unset to auto-find a in the scene on start.

member.name: P:Skafinity.SkafinityMusicPanel.IsOpen
member.summary: Whether the settings board is showing (toggled by the ♪ button).

member.name: M:Skafinity.SkafinityMusicPanel.Toggle
member.summary: Open/close the settings board.
